description: Maintain individual user master records: logon data, roles, profiles, user type, validity dates.
Mass user maintenance - apply role/profile changes to many users at once.
Display the last failed authorization check for the current or a specified user.
Display and reset a user's authorization buffer without requiring full re-login.
Classic system trace covering authorization, DB, RFC, and other check categories in one timeline.
Modern, scalable authorization-specific trace tool, the recommended default for auth-only investigations.
User Information System - reporting across users, roles, profiles, and authorizations system-wide.
Profile Generator - the central transaction for role design, menu assembly, authorization maintenance, and generation.
Maintain check indicators and default authorization values controlling PFCG's proposal behavior per transaction.
Reconcile SU24 default data after an upgrade or support pack, merging SAP's shipped changes with customer entries.
Maintain authorization object definitions and their fields.
SAP-delivered (non-customer-namespace) equivalent of SU24 default value maintenance.
Configure the Security Audit Log, defining which event categories get recorded.
Analyze/read the Security Audit Log for recorded security-relevant events.
System log - general system-level event and error logging, useful alongside security-specific logs during incident investigation.
Gateway monitor - manage and review secinfo/reginfo access control list configuration.
Maintain RFC destinations, including stored credentials and trusted/trusting system relationships.
Trust Manager - maintain Personal Security Environments (PSE) and imported trusted certificates.
Maintain and activate HTTP service nodes (Internet Communication Framework), a prerequisite for any OData/Fiori/SAML SSO service.
Configure an ABAP system's SAML2 Service Provider trust relationships to one or more Identity Providers.
SAP Reference IMG - central customizing entry point, relevant for locating security-adjacent configuration nodes.
General table display/browsing tool, commonly used for direct authorization-relevant table queries during audits.
Administer analysis authorizations for embedded/BW-style analytics.
Maintain trusted system relationships for trusted RFC connections.
Transport Management System - configure transport routes, domains, and manage import queues.
ABAP Editor / Object Navigator, used to review custom code for AUTHORITY-CHECK statements during security review.
Generic table maintenance transactions, gated by S_TABU_DIS/S_TABU_NAM authorization.
Define and monitor background jobs, gated by S_BTCH_JOB authorization.
Register and activate OData services at the Gateway layer.
Review Gateway front-end (IWFND) error logs, essential for OData/batch troubleshooting.
Review Gateway back-end enablement (IWBEP) error logs.
Web-based console for managing BTP subaccounts, XSUAA role collections, and trust configuration (not a classic ABAP tcode).
Web-based console for managing HANA privileges, roles, and audit policies (not a classic ABAP tcode).
Web-based console for configuring IAS trust relationships, conditional authentication rules, and federation to corporate IdPs (not a classic ABAP tcode).
Web-based console for configuring IPS source/target provisioning systems, mappings, and filters (not a classic ABAP tcode).
Web-based administration UI for the on-premise Cloud Connector agent, managing system/resource access control lists (not a classic ABAP tcode).
The SAP GRC Access Control workspace for Access Request Management, risk analysis, and mitigation control administration (Fiori/NWBC-based, not a single classic tcode).
Adjustment transactions for modified objects during an upgrade, frequently executed alongside SU25 in the same upgrade project phase.
Client administration settings, gated by S_ADMI_FCD, relevant to client copy and system landscape security review.
Display/maintain HR master data infotypes, gated by P_ORGIN and related structural authorization objects.
Transport Organizer transactions for creating, releasing, and managing transport requests, gated by S_TRANSPRT.
